text:
is a compilation of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Film Books for Neon Genesis Evangelion films. It was written by Newtype Editorial Department and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 27 November 2000. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048531425 

Overview

The book is a compilation of previous books and cover Evangelion: Death, Air Magokoro o, kimi ni.
